title: senecio submontanus
intro: Senecio submontanus, also known as Mountain Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio submontanus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Senecio submontanus can be found in tea, infusion, or tincture forms, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
